events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing supplemental electrode is a **fail** (non-compliant) under NEC 250.53(A)(2)/(D)(2) — a single rod/pipe/plate or water-pipe electrode requires either a supplemental electrode or a documented ≤25Ω resistance test, neither of which is present. Corrective action is a second bonded electrode (or a documented test) before covering/closing out.
